last_angles: Aspiration — the trader who executes their rules perfectly already has everything they need to win; the gap is execution, not knowledge
Fear — 'the bot won't understand context' is self-deception; the trader is the one ignoring context when emotional
Educational — a 45% win rate with 2.5R is profitable, but traders abandon the system before the math lands
Curiosity — XAUUSD viral stop-loss thread: gold moved while trader was on a date, stopped out on 4 orders; 24/7 market vs human schedule
Social Proof — Marco: 18 months manual with solid strategy, inconsistent results; 3 months automated, consistent green weeks; same strategy, different executor
Identity — JessTrading built on one observation: good strategies fail because human execution fails them — the bot protects your intelligence from yourself
Contrast — manual trader -$290 vs bot +$410 same week same chart; product pitch with $197 one-time CTA
